name: structured_query
title: Structured aggregate query (parameterized)
description: Run a PARAMETERIZED, allowlisted query template against Synapse Serverless for exact aggregates, trends, counts, geography rollups, realized-value (true net) economics, and demand/competition metrics — or to fetch authoritative price/date/region for a set of lot_ids returned by comps_search. NEVER generates free-form SQL. Every number returned is authoritative and traceable to a Lot ID or a named aggregate over Lot IDs. Realized-value and geo templates compute TRUE net economics from in-Lot money fields only (zero PII). Demand templates return AGGREGATE COUNTS ONLY — never bidder identity.

template.description: Allowlisted template name. realized_value / realized_value_by_geo compute true net-to-consignor and all-in-to-buyer from in-Lot money fields (see Docs/specs/realized-value-template.md, geo-rollups-template.md). demand_metrics returns aggregate bid/watch counts with NO bidder identity (see Docs/specs/demand-competition-template.md).

params.description: Template-specific parameters (validated server-side). category/make/model/region/state/county/year_min/year_max filter the lot population; group_by selects the geo rollup grain for realized_value_by_geo.

state.description: In-Lot address state (2-letter or name), e.g. 'ND'.

filter_notes.description: Human-readable description of the scope actually applied (for transparency).
